rows.owner_action: Use the platform-specific Bio/Profile link copy from the action sheet.
rows.evidence_required: Action sheet has active platforms, valid /start/ UTM links, and no issues.
rows.stop_condition: Stop if any Bio adds paid, diagnosis, therapy, or guarantee claims.

rows.owner_action: Use the consolidated profile setup handoff pack before touching platform profiles.
rows.evidence_required: profile-setup-handoff-pack has active ready_to_configure rows, or profile setup is already configured with traceable proof.
rows.stop_condition: Stop if any platform lacks a public-ready profile link, proof template, or identity check.

rows.owner_action: After setting each public profile link, write back status set/live with a proof note.
rows.evidence_required: platform-profile-tracker.csv has status set/live, set date, and traceable proof for all platforms.
rows.stop_condition: Do not write set/live without screenshot, clicked public link, or platform timestamp evidence.

rows.owner_action: Confirm every completed profile row has proof in the evidence ledger.
rows.evidence_required: Evidence ledger traceable count equals required count and evidence issues are zero.
rows.stop_condition: Stop if proof note is vague, missing, or not tied to a platform/date.

rows.owner_action: Refresh promotion docs after profile writeback before opening publication.
rows.evidence_required: Profile completion gate packetsInSync is true.
rows.stop_condition: Do not publish from stale action sheets after tracker writeback.

rows.owner_action: Confirm launch readiness opens first-batch publishing.
rows.stop_condition: Stop if profile links are incomplete, campaign UTM is invalid, or assets are not ready.

rows.owner_action: Publish only the first batch rows that become ready after the profile gate opens.
rows.evidence_required: First-batch publish action sheet has active ready rows, or the first-batch publication packet proves the row is already published.
rows.stop_condition: Do not publish if any row remains blocked_until_profile_links.

rows.owner_action: Confirm first-batch assets are ready and placeholder proof templates are still safely rejected.
rows.evidence_required: first-batch-publish-readiness-pack has active asset-ready rows and safely rejected proof templates.
rows.stop_condition: Do not publish if proof templates become importable before real public post URLs exist.

rows.owner_action: Keep post proof handoff files ready for real URLs while rejecting placeholders.
rows.evidence_required: post-proof-handoff-pack has active proof files and safely rejected templates.
rows.stop_condition: Do not run writeback until the proof check becomes ready_to_import with real platform URLs.

rows.owner_action: Keep the stage matrix exposing exactly one current blocker before advancing.
rows.evidence_required: stage-transition-matrix has one current_blocker and no issues.
rows.stop_condition: Stop if multiple current blockers appear or if later stages become next before profile handoff.
